title: Update eslint-plugin-jasmine to version 2.0.0 🚀
body:
Hello lovely humans, [eslint-plugin-jasmine](https://www.npmjs.com/package/eslint-plugin-jasmine) just published its new version 2.0.0.
State Update :rocket:
Dependency eslint-plugin-jasmine
New version 2.0.0
Type devDependency
This version is **not covered** by your **current version range**. Without accepting this pull request your project will work just like it did before. There might be a bunch of new features, fixes and perf improvements that the maintainers worked on for you though. I recommend you look into these changes and try to get onto the latest version of eslint-plugin-jasmine. Given that you have a decent test suite, a passing build is a strong indicator that you can take advantage of these changes by merging the proposed change into your project. Otherwise this branch is a great starting point for you to work on the update. Do you have any ideas how I could improve these pull requests? Did I report anything you think isn’t right? Are you unsure about how things are supposed to work? There is a collection of [frequently asked questions](https://greenkeeper.io/faq.html) and while I’m just a bot, there is a group of people who are happy to teach me new things. [Let them know](https://github.com/greenkeeperio/greenkeeper/issues/new). Good luck with your project :sparkles: You rock! :palm_tree: --- [GitHub Release](https://github.com/tlvince/eslint-plugin-jasmine/releases/tag/v2.0.0)

2.0.0 (2016-11-01)

Breaking Changes

  • This module no longer supports Node.js 0.10 (886eaba7)
--- The new version differs by 9 commits . - [`18e29df`](https://github.com/tlvince/eslint-plugin-jasmine/commit/18e29df6470953aa1fd6456b29049df24b1a336a) chore(package): add engines - [`ed27076`](https://github.com/tlvince/eslint-plugin-jasmine/commit/ed27076c8345989692fad402a51152c2de6789e1) chore(travis): use bundled npm (v3) - [`886eaba`](https://github.com/tlvince/eslint-plugin-jasmine/commit/886eaba7ff03c3d69966bcb7d4952f6eaa9ef9ab) chore: drop support for Node.js 0.10 - [`5908fb1`](https://github.com/tlvince/eslint-plugin-jasmine/commit/5908fb122408349defc0754b2201353fcec62102) feat(no-unsafe-spy): add no-unsafe-spy rule - [`c68c1f2`](https://github.com/tlvince/eslint-plugin-jasmine/commit/c68c1f210eb64ed20cf71d40a709c837996f2a57) chore: add GitHub templates - [`ce76c3d`](https://github.com/tlvince/eslint-plugin-jasmine/commit/ce76c3d52aa93384f2b90ae384e3942e6b102e07) chore: validate commit message format - [`bdbeb91`](https://github.com/tlvince/eslint-plugin-jasmine/commit/bdbeb91ed61a66e2b93728b2ea7c7593cdd4e385) Merge pull request #57 from tlvince/greenkeeper-standard-7.0.0 - [`ac9ac09`](https://github.com/tlvince/eslint-plugin-jasmine/commit/ac9ac09f4c4a70c055be5a534a2a26c5cb6da244) chore(package): update standard to version 7.0.0 - [`3546d9b`](https://github.com/tlvince/eslint-plugin-jasmine/commit/3546d9b3d99ffda2591eb1e7384b76ceb3be38a0) docs: add Jasmine env note See the [full diff](https://github.com/tlvince/eslint-plugin-jasmine/compare/7169a25d9b46ab079fea50b320899b5a6dc3239d...18e29df6470953aa1fd6456b29049df24b1a336a). --- This pull request was created by [greenkeeper.io](https://greenkeeper.io/). Tired of seeing this sponsor message? :zap: `greenkeeper upgrade`
